new_check.description: Used structural graph query for Handler trait analysis

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph(Handler, direction=both, depth=2) to discover Handler implementations and composes edges. Baseline read files directly. MCP check only passes for sense.

new_check.description: Used semantic search for extractor system analysis

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_search to find extractor implementations across axum-core and axum. Baseline used sequential file reads. MCP check only passes for sense.

new_check.description: Used semantic search to trace serve-to-response lifecycle

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_search('serve TcpListener accept') to locate the serve entry point without reading serve/mod.rs. Baseline read the file 4 times. MCP check only passes for sense.

new_check.description: References the base server file (class is named Server not BaseServer)

modifications.rationale: The word:BaseServer check penalizes sense because the class is literally named 'Server' at base-server.ts:316. Adding the file name as alternative ensures correct answers aren't penalized. Both agents reference this file.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for SSR lifecycle tracing

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph(renderToHTMLOrFlight, callers, depth=3) and sense_graph(AppPageRouteModule.render, callers, depth=3) to trace the SSR pipeline. Baseline used grep. MCP check only passes for sense.

new_check.description: Used structural graph for caller analysis of renderToHTMLOrFlight

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph(renderToHTMLOrFlight, callers) to find AppPageRouteModule.render as the only caller with confidence=1.0. Baseline used grep. MCP check only passes for sense.

new_check.description: Used semantic search to find existing request ID infrastructure

modifications.rationale: Sense's sense_search surfaced NEXT_REQUEST_ID_HEADER as top result (score=1.00) and used sense_graph to confirm zero callers. Baseline found it via grep. MCP check only passes for sense.
